name: D-C-multiple-trees-different-sizes
description: Two 80-foot pines near driveway and one 110-foot oak leaning toward house — two distinct groups

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for calling NorthStar Tree Service. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: I have two 80-foot pines near the driveway and one 110-foot oak leaning toward the house.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: So two pines near the driveway and an oak leaning toward the house. Is this an emergency?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: No, not an emergency. The oak is the one I'm most worried about.
